mapper.select: select r.*, u.real_name as user_name, au.real_name as audit_user_name, fu.real_name as first_audit_user_name, su.real_name as second_audit_user_name from biz_recharge_order r left join sys_user u on u.id = r.user_id left join sys_user au on au.id = r.audit_user_id left join sys_user fu on fu.id = r.first_audit_user_id left join sys_user su on su.id = r.second_audit_user_id where r.user_id = #{userId} order by r.create_time desc

select r.*, u.real_name as user_name, au.real_name as audit_user_name, fu.real_name as first_audit_user_name, su.real_name as second_audit_user_name from biz_recharge_order r left join sys_user u on u.id = r.user_id left join sys_user au on au.id = r.audit_user_id left join sys_user fu on fu.id = r.first_audit_user_id left join sys_user su on su.id = r.second_audit_user_id where r.user_id = #{userId} order by r.create_time desc limit #{offset}, #{pageSize}

select r.*, u.real_name as user_name, au.real_name as audit_user_name, fu.real_name as first_audit_user_name, su.real_name as second_audit_user_name from biz_recharge_order r left join sys_user u on u.id = r.user_id left join sys_user au on au.id = r.audit_user_id left join sys_user fu on fu.id = r.first_audit_user_id left join sys_user su on su.id = r.second_audit_user_id where r.id = #{id} limit 1
mapper.update: update biz_recharge_order set status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, audit_user_id = #{auditUserId}, audit_time = #{auditTime}, update_time = #{updateTime} where id = #{id}
update biz_recharge_order set status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, audit_user_id = #{auditUserId}, audit_time = #{auditTime}, update_time = #{updateTime} where id = #{id} and status = 'PENDING'

update biz_recharge_order set status = #{status}, review_status = #{reviewStatus}, first_audit_user_id = #{firstAuditUserId}, first_audit_time = #{firstAuditTime}, audit_user_id = #{auditUserId}, audit_time = #{auditTime}, update_time = #{updateTime} where id = #{id} and status = 'PENDING'

update biz_recharge_order set status = #{status}, review_status = #{reviewStatus}, second_audit_user_id = #{secondAuditUserId}, second_audit_time = #{secondAuditTime}, audit_user_id = #{auditUserId}, audit_time = #{auditTime}, update_time = #{updateTime} where id = #{id} and status = 'REVIEW_PENDING'

update biz_recharge_order set status = #{status}, review_status = #{reviewStatus}, remark = #{remark}, audit_user_id = #{auditUserId}, audit_time = #{auditTime}, update_time = #{updateTime} where id = #{id} and status in ('PENDING', 'REVIEW_PENDING')
